transcript:
Agent: Hello, thank you for calling BrightTech Support. This is Sophie. How can I help you today?

Customer: Hi Sophie. I am actually not calling with a problem. I called a couple of weeks ago with a really complicated billing issue and a gentleman named James helped me. I just wanted to call back and let someone know how great he was.

Agent: That is so lovely to hear, Alan! It truly means a lot when customers take the time to do that. Can you tell me roughly when you called so I can make sure the right James gets the recognition?

Customer: It was around April 28th, in the afternoon. He spent almost an hour with me sorting out a very complicated account merge. He never made me feel like I was taking too long and he followed up with an email the next day to make sure everything was still correct.

Agent: That sounds like it was James Okonkwo on our premium support team. He is wonderful. I am going to log this as a formal compliment on his record — this kind of feedback goes directly to his performance review.

Customer: Oh good. He genuinely made a stressful situation feel manageable. You should be proud to have him on your team.

Agent: We absolutely are. I will make sure this is highlighted for his manager today. Is there anything else I can help you with?

Customer: No, that is all. Keep up the good work.

Agent: Thank you so much for calling, Alan. This made my day too. Have a wonderful afternoon!
